Great news — I've looked into everything and I can help you get those corrected! Here's the process:

## Summary of Discrepancies Found

Here are the **5 transactions** on your **Business Silver Rewards Card** where the rewards appear incorrect:

| # | Date | Merchant | Amount | Expected Points | Got Points | Shortfall |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | Mar 22 | **JetBlue Airways** (Travel - promo) | $315.00 | 6,300 pts | 3,150 pts | **-3,150 pts** |
| 2 | Apr 10 | **Microsoft 365** (Software - promo) | $79.99 | ~1,599 pts | 160 pts | **-1,439 pts** |
| 3 | Aug 25 | **Southwest Airlines** (Travel - post-promo) | $380.00 | 3,800 pts | 1,520 pts | **-2,280 pts** |
| 4 | Sep 15 | **Zoom Video** (Software - post-promo) | $149.99 | 1,499 pts | 600 pts | **-899 pts** |
| 5 | Oct 15 | **Coursera** (Software - post-promo) | $49.99 | 499 pts | 50 pts | **-449 pts** |
| | | | | | **Total** | **~8,217 pts** |

## How to Get This Fixed

To start the process, I can give you a tool to submit cash back disputes directly for each transaction. You'll need to run the following command for each one:

1. **JetBlue Airways** — use `submit_cash_back_dispute_0589(user_id="755bcb4d5d", transaction_id="txn_a8f1c2d3e403")`
2. **Microsoft 365** — use `submit_cash_back_dispute_0589(user_id="755bcb4d5d", transaction_id="txn_a8f1c2d3e404")`
3. **Southwest Airlines** — use `submit_cash_back_dispute_0589(user_id="755bcb4d5d", transaction_id="txn_a8f1c2d3e410")`
4. **Zoom Video** — use `submit_cash_back_dispute_0589(user_id="755bcb4d5d", transaction_id="txn_a8f1c2d3e411")`
5. **Coursera** — use `submit_cash_back_dispute_0589(user_id="755bcb4d5d", transaction_id="txn_a8f1c2d3e414")`

I've already unlocked the tool for the first one (JetBlue). Would you like me to provide the tool now so you can start submitting the disputes? Once the disputes are reviewed and approved, I can then apply the corrected rewards to your account!
